name: Unbaked Graham-Cracker Crumb Crust (9 Inch)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F. If desired, make graham-cracker crumbs by pulverizing crackers in a blender or food processor with knife blade attached as manufacturer directs; or place them in a sturdy plastic bag and roll into fine crumbs with a rolling pin.
2. In a pie plate or bowl, mix crumbs with the remaining ingredients. Optionally set aside 3 tablespoons for topping. Press mixture onto bottom and up side of pie plate.
3. Chill piecrust well; Fill as recipe directs or with chilled pie filling; top with reserved crumb mixture or garnish as recipe directs.
